backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, handling user profile management, video storage, comments, admin dashboard analytics, and access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (Settings page sections, LanguageSelector relocation, version display, admin link visibility) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable changes of components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mediatube React app, loading the Google Identity Services script and mounting the app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that defines all TanStack Router routes (including the new `/settings` route) and wraps the app in a QueryClientProvider with a shared Layout, BottomNav, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: A button component that opens a popover allowing authenticated users to add or remove a video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Ad overlay component that displays a full-screen advertisement image with a countdown timer, allowing users to skip the ad after 5 seconds or auto-closing after 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile (hidden on lg+) with links to Home, Shorts, Reels, Subscriptions, and Settings, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A full-featured camera recording modal supporting filters, zoom, music selection, mic selection, duration options, and camera flip for recording short-form video clips.
Displays a list of comments for a video with user avatars and timestamps, and provides an input form for authenticated users to submit new comments.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCar: Renders a single community post card showing the author's avatar, name, handle, timestamp, post body, and an optional delete button with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCom: A form component for authenticated users to create community posts with optional image attachments, including an upload progress bar.
frontend/src/components/EarningsStatsCar: Displays a grid of four admin earnings stat cards (total balance, total withdrawn, pending withdrawals, creator count) with loading skeletons and an error/retry state.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: A dialog modal that allows the authenticated user to edit their own profile fields (name, handle, channel description) and submit updates via the useUpdateUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/EditUserModal.ts: An admin-facing dialog modal for editing another user's profile (name, handle, description) by principal, submitting changes via the useAdminSaveUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/FilterSelector.t: Renders a horizontally scrollable row of filter buttons for video filters, highlighting the active filter and calling an onFilterChange callback on selection.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users switch the app language among seven supported locales, using the LanguageContext for state management.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application shell providing the top navigation bar, sidebar, search with voice input, authentication handling, avatar display, and profile setup modal, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/MusicPickerPanel: A bottom-sheet panel for selecting a background music track from a library, supporting audio preview playback and a 'no music' option, closing and passing the selection back via a callback.
frontend/src/components/NetworkStatusBan: Displays a banner at the top of the page indicating offline status or a brief 'back online' confirmation after reconnection, using the useNetworkStatus hook.
frontend/src/components/OfflineErrorStat: Displays a centered offline error UI with a WifiOff icon, a configurable message, and an optional retry button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A dialog modal for new users to set up their channel name and handle, pre-populated from Google auth data, and saved via the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Fetches all videos and renders a sidebar list of up to 12 non-short recommended videos (excluding the current one) with thumbnails, duration, and view counts.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: A full-screen short-video reel card with autoplay/pause based on active state, mute toggle, like animation, comment drawer, subscribe action, and progress bar.
frontend/src/components/ReelCommentsDraw: A bottom-sheet drawer for viewing and posting comments on a reel, fetching comments via hook and supporting authenticated comment submission.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A button that copies the video's URL to the clipboard and shows a temporary 'Copied!' confirmation, supporting both icon-only and full-label variants.
A subscribe/unsubscribe toggle button for a channel principal that reflects current subscription state and handles auth-gated subscribe/unsubscribe mutations.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: A horizontally scrollable row of up to 10 trending non-short videos with rank badges, duration overlays, and left/right scroll buttons.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: Renders a video card with thumbnail, duration badge, short badge, uploader avatar, title, and channel link. Fetches uploader profile for avatar display and links to video/channel pages.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: Full-featured video player component with play/pause, mute, volume, seek, fullscreen, playback rate, chapter markers, and an end-screen with countdown to a recommended video.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the app's current language, persisting the selection to localStorage and supporting seven language codes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend addComment method and invalidates the comments query for the relevant video on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the backend and invalidates related playlist queries, showing an error toast on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook for admin video removal that invalidates dashboard and video list queries, showing success or error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminSaveUserProfi: Mutation hook that saves a user profile via the admin backend method and invalidates the admin dashboard query, with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Custom hook managing camera/microphone access, MediaRecorder-based video recording, device enumeration, facing mode switching, and elapsed time tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the backend and invalidates the apiKeys query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCommunityPos: Mutation hook that creates a community post with optional attachment, invalidates community posts queries, and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new playlist via the backend, invalidates the playlists query, and shows success or error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteCommunityPos: Mutation hook that deletes a community post and invalidates both communityPosts and communityPostsByChannel queries with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID, invalidates the playlists query, and shows success or error toasts.
Query hook that fetches admin dashboard data from the backend, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAdminEarningsSt: Query hook that fetches platform earnings statistics via the admin backend method, enabled only for authenticated users.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend, enabled once the actor is available and refetches on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: React Query hook that fetches the list of API keys for the authenticated user via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that retrieves the current caller's user profile from the backend actor, with combined loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: React Query hook that fetches all videos belonging to a given channel Principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommentCount.ts: React Query hook that retrieves the total comment count for a specific video by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: React Query hook that fetches all comments for a given video ID from the backend.
React Query hook that fetches all community posts and returns them sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommunityPostsB: React Query hook that fetches community posts for a specific channel Principal, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCreatorBankAcco: React Query hook that retrieves the authenticated creator's bank account state from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMonetizationSta: React Query hook that fetches monetization statistics for the authenticated user from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single playlist by its ID, returning null if not found or ID is absent.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: React Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated user.
React Query hook that retrieves the list of videos belonging to a specific playlist ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribedReels: React Query hook that fetches short/reel videos from channels the authenticated user is subscribed to.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: React Query hook that retrieves the list of subscriber Principals for a given channel.
React Query hook that fetches trending videos from the backend, with window-focus refetch disabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: React Query hook that fetches the user profile for a given Principal, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: React Query hook that fetches metadata for a single video by its ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Provides a Google Sign-In context and provider using the GSI client library, persisting the authenticated user to localStorage and exposing login/logout handlers.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: React Query mutation hook that increments a video's view count and invalidates related video queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using the DFINITY AuthClient, exposing login/logout and identity state with session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicMixer.ts: Hook that mixes a background music track with a video blob's audio using the Web Audio API, returning progress state and the resulting WAV blob.
frontend/src/hooks/useNetworkStatus.ts: Hook that tracks the browser's online/offline status via navigator.onLine and window events, returning a boolean.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: React Query mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist via the actor and invalidates related playlist queries on success.
React Query mutation hook that submits a withdrawal request for a given amount and handles specific error messages like invalid amount or pending withdrawal.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: React Query mutation hook that revokes an API key via the actor and invalidates the apiKeys query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: React Query hook that searches for videos by a search term using the actor, only enabled when the actor is ready and the search term is non-empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: React Query mutation hook that fetches the current profile and updates it with a new avatar image, invalidating the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: Exports two React Query mutation hooks for subscribing and unsubscribing from a channel by Principal, invalidating the subscribers query on success.
React Query mutation hook that updates a user's profile (name, description, handle, avatar) via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: React Query mutation hook that uploads a video file with metadata via the actor, supporting upload progress callbacks and invalidating the videos query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoFilter.ts: Hook that provides a utility to create a canvas-based filtered MediaStream from a video element, supporting CSS filters and zoom via drawImage cropping.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts: Hook that wraps the Web Speech API to provide voice-to-text search functionality, exposing listening state, transcript, and error handling.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map keyed by language code, containing UI string translations for the app's English and Spanish (and other) locales.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports fonts, and defines a dark-mode-first design system with CSS custom properties for colors, admin panel tokens, and utility classes.
frontend/src/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite app, loading the Google Sign-In script and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with a sidebar navigation for managing users, videos, and earnings stats, including modals for editing users and confirming video removal.
frontend/src/pages/ChannelPage.tsx: Channel profile page that fetches and displays a user's videos, playlists, community posts, and subscriber count with tabbed navigation and offline error handling.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Community feed page that renders a post composer and a list of community posts with loading skeletons and offline error state handling.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Static page displaying Mediatube's copyright policy, including content ownership rules and the DMCA takedown process.
frontend/src/pages/DownloadAppPage.tsx: Marketing page for downloading the Mediatube mobile app, featuring a hero section, app feature highlights, screenshots, and Android/iOS download buttons.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying a category filter bar, a trending videos section, and a responsive video grid with loading skeletons and offline error handling.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page with email/password fields and Google OAuth sign-in, showing a profile setup modal for new Google users before redirecting to home.
frontend/src/pages/MonetizationPage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Displays a single playlist's details and its videos, allowing the playlist owner to remove individual videos or delete the entire playlist.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Shows the authenticated user's playlists in a grid and provides a dialog to create new playlists; redirects unauthenticated users to a sign-in prompt.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the current user's channel profile with avatar upload, subscriber/video counts, and an edit profile modal; shows a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Full-screen vertical reels feed with 'For You' and 'Following' tabs, using IntersectionObserver to track the active reel and handling offline/unauthenticated states.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Renders video search results in a responsive grid based on a URL query parameter, with loading skeletons and offline/empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Renders the app settings page with sections for language selection, version info, and an admin panel link (visible only to admins), using reusable SettingsSection/SettingsRow components.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of short videos (under 60 seconds) filtered from all videos, with loading skeletons, offline error handling, and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/SignupPage.tsx: Provides a signup page supporting email/password (stub), Internet Identity, and Google OAuth flows, with a profile setup modal triggered for new Google users.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Shows a grid of videos from all channels the authenticated user is subscribed to, with loading skeletons, offline error handling, and unauthenticated/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Provides a video upload form supporting file selection, camera recording, optional background music mixing, and short-video toggling, then submits to the backend with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Renders a full video player page with the video, uploader info, like/dislike buttons, theatre mode, chapter parsing from description, comments, and recommended videos sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/WithdrawalPage.tsx: React page that lets authenticated creators view their dollar balance, request withdrawals, and see a history of withdrawal statuses. Handles offline state, input validation, and displays pending/approved/cancelled badges.
frontend/src/types/filters.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a configuration map for seven photo/video CSS filters (normal, beauty, vivid, b&w, warm, cool, vintage) including display names, CSS filter strings, and emoji icons.
frontend/src/types/music.ts: Defines the MusicTrack interface and a static MUSIC_LIBRARY array of five sample audio tracks with metadata (id, name, artist, URL, duration).
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides two utility functions: converting a Uint8Array image blob to a base64 data URL (with MIME type detection) and generating two-letter initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports three formatting utilities: formatViewCount (abbreviates numbers to K/M), formatTimeAgo (converts nanosecond timestamps to relative strings), and formatDuration (formats seconds as HH:MM:SS or MM:SS).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), brand color palettes (mt-red, mt-charcoal, admin panel tokens), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing implemented features, and architectural notes for a Settings page consolidating Language, Version, Admin, About App, and Download sections.
